use_cases: User sign-in with email and password authentication flow
New user registration with terms agreement and validation
Password reset request and confirmation flow
Multi-view form with animated transitions between auth states
Form validation with real-time error feedback
ai_summary: A comprehensive authentication form component featuring sign-in, sign-up, and password reset workflows with animated view transitions. Built with React Hook Form, Zod validation, and Framer Motion for smooth state changes. Includes password visibility toggle, loading states, and error handling. Designed with a fintech aesthetic using clean, modern UI components.
